category_title: Low-attaining students who engage through 'playful' drama rather than traditional 'work'
scenario_title: Over-dependence on teacher support and disengagement with traditional work
minimal_context: The student is transitioning from a drama project to written collaborative group work about A Midsummer Night's Dream in an English classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Now that the acting scheme is over, please look at your scripts for A Midsummer Night's Dream and start the traditional written work.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sighs and moans) Can we just do more acting? Acting is fun, work is boring.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's just focus on the first question on your worksheet.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't get it. Come over here and help us.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Try to read the text with your group and see what you can find.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: We can't do it, it's too hard. You haven't given me any help yet and I need you to tell me what to write.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Now that the acting scheme is over, please look at your scripts for A Midsummer Night's Dream and start the traditional written work.

STUDENT: (Sighs and moans) Can we just do more acting? Acting is fun, work is boring.

TUTOR: Let's just focus on the first question on your worksheet.

STUDENT: I don't get it. Come over here and help us.

TUTOR: Try to read the text with your group and see what you can find.

STUDENT: We can't do it, it's too hard. You haven't given me any help yet and I need you to tell me what to write.

task.content: Collaborative group work studying A Midsummer Night's Dream

context.materials: Scripts, resources to access the text's language

challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Seeking teacher help immediately, very dependent upon support and input, preoccupied with how much help they received

behavior_patterns.condition: When they realised the scheme was over and returning to traditional work
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Began sighing and moaning, asked for 'more acting'
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Felt that the project had not been 'work'
related_quotes: acting is fun, work is boring
